title: vault-config.yaml — tags section
description: Canonical input contract for scripts/vault-config-writer.py tags. The writer renders the top-level `tags:` block of vault-config.yaml from this JSON, replacing any previous tags block while leaving the rest of the file byte-for-byte untouched.

prefixes.description: Map keyed by tag prefix name (first `/`-segment of a tag path).

description.description: Short human-readable explanation of this prefix category.

known_values.description: Observed values under this prefix (full path beyond the prefix, no leading slash).

wildcard.description: true = Tomo may invent new values under this prefix; false = only known_values are allowed. Independent of `proposable`.

proposable.description: true = Tomo may actively propose this prefix when suggesting tags for new notes; false = Tomo leaves this prefix alone (external taxonomy like Raindrop/, Readwise/, or Obsidian lifecycle tags Tomo does not manage). `required_for` still wins — a prefix with `proposable: false` and `required_for: [atomic_note]` is set from known_values without free invention.

required_for.description: Concept types that must carry at least one tag in this prefix.
